name: Vegetable-Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions; chill.
2. Sprinkle cucumber generously with salt; cover and let stand 30 minutes. Rinse well.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine carrot, beans, and peas. Cover with water, and cook 8 to 10 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain and rinse in cold water.
4. Combine cucumber, carrot, beans, peas, rice, red pepper, and tomatoes in a large bowl.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together vinegar, salt, and pepper. Gradually add olive oil, beating with a wire whisk until blended.
6. Pour dressing over salad, and toss gently. Serve on lettuce leaves.
